Description:
**NOTE**: Host requires CD2 Update 17 or above
  **NOTE**: Only the host is required to have MEV & DEA to add korlok sprouts & stabber vines into the stationary pool.

  The harder version of DR. Higher enemy diversity. More pressuring waves. As well as an increased presence of weakened dreads & special HVTs.
  
  a01:
  Differences from DR_b28:
  - 5 new enemies added + the last 3 enemies that spawn exclusively in a seperate WS
    - Turbo Grabbers: Elite Grabbers with the same health as regular Grabbers that move 5x faster, -50% grab time, fear immunity & has vanilla grabber damage threshold
    - Glyphid Sharpshooters (formerly known as Grenade Spitter prior to DR_b12): They are kursite acid spitters that fires high-speed projectiles with incredibly high accuracy
    - Elite Younglings: Slightly larger younglings that have a similar AI to Shellbombers where they tend to roll more often
    - Proximity Exploders: Invulnerable Elite Exploders with a brighter shade, it can only be damaged when a player is atleast 3m away
    - Rogue Cores: Inspired for Interstellar's The Sun, they are floating Ommoran rocks that buffs every enemy's movement, attack & projectile speed in the mission
    - Glyphid Rampagers: Elite Oppressors with a larger knockback force when it uses their rage quake attack, falls into rampage when its health falls below 50%
    - Hyper Stingtails: Stronger & faster versions of regular Stingtails, they use their grab attack much more frequently
    - Death Stalkers: Enhanced Stalkers with incredibly fast movement speeds & only burrow if they have hit their target, insta-kills players in a single attack (except in solo) unless players have have invulnerbility buffs  
  
  - Resupply cost is now 40/50/60
  - -50% health regen speed
  - Some mutators are banned
  - Both Enemy & Normal wave intervals get shorter as the mission progresses
  - For every resupply called, +0.01333 enemy speed modifier
  - +33.3% & +25% max active enemies for 1p & 2p to 4p scalings respectively
  - Certain mission phases now have increased EnemyCountModifier
  - Stationary difficulty increased by 10% 
  - Fat wave chance increased from 10% to 20%
  - Increased average enemy diversity per spawn event
  - Friendly-fire modifier increased from 0.9 to 1.1
  - +25% more Grunts but ~-17.75% spawn points received
  - Removed All dreads, barrier spitters & cryo bombers from the enemy pool, instead they will be spawning in their own WS
  - +50% Grunt, Exploder, Swarmer, Shocker, Shredder, Web Spitter, Acid Spitter, Septic, Mactera Spawn & Trijaw max spawn count
  - All wave spawners no longer pause when a player is downed or have increased intervals during certain mission phases

  - Enhanced Wave Spawners:
    - Added a 5% chance to spawn 3 weak bulks to the trash mob wave
    - -15 sec base interval to the elite WS
    - Added a special WS that spawns either 2 Barrier Spitters, Cryo Bombers, Ebonite Grunts or 4 Elite Swarmers every 45-90 secs, starting after 100-200 secs
    - Area denial WS renamed to disruptive WS that now spawns either 2 Elite Trijaws, Elite Flamdles or Fireball Spreaders every 75 secs, starting after 100-200 secs
    - Added a dread WS that spawns either a weak lacerator, arbalest or OG dread every 60-90 secs
    - Added a havoc WS that spawns either spawns a Fast Crassus, Rampager, Hyper Stingtail or Death Stalker every 180-360 secs    
    - Every 10-20 secs, an additional extraction wave will spawn
		  - Base difficulty of the wave spawner increases, the closer the mule/player (excluding downed players) is to the drop pod or the drop pod is to be ready during PE countdowns/Salvage extractions
      - 4-7 enemy diversity
      - Spawns enemies from the main enemy pool very close to the players
Name: DS_a01
